summary: Iteration 10 pre-launch testing complete. Verified 1) forgot/reset password (JWT-based), 2) 15-day trial on register with only leads+crm modules, 3) super_admin-only reset-demo-data endpoint, 4) CRM deals bulk-action move/delete, 5) LoginPage forgot-password modal, 6) ResetPasswordPage rendering + redirect without token, 7) Pipeline Kanban/Lista toggle, 8) Settings Empresa reset-demo-data-button visible for super_admin, 9) Mobile sidebar toggle (<lg viewport). All 10 backend tests pass. All verified frontend flows pass.

minor.issue: Uses bare 'except:' which catches any exception (including KeyboardInterrupt/SystemExit). Narrow to jwt.PyJWTError/Exception.
Fallback JWT secret hardcoded 'spectra-flow-secret-key-2024' if JWT_SECRET missing. Should fail fast instead to avoid insecure default.
Returns 400 when email missing which slightly leaks behavior vs enumeration protection; consider returning 200 generic message for any input.
Deletes only current user's tenant_id data; endpoint name says 'demo' but super_admin could accidentally wipe real tenant. Consider explicit tenant_id param or demo-only flag.

issues: Uses custom circle icons instead of native <input type=checkbox> which limits native a11y / keyboard accessibility. Consider adding role=checkbox and aria-checked.

passed_tests: POST /api/auth/forgot-password valid email returns 200 generic message
POST /api/auth/reset-password valid JWT token updates password; old password rejected
POST /api/auth/register creates tenant plan=trial, trial_ends_at ~15 days, modules leads=true crm=true prospeccion=false email_marketing=false
POST /api/admin/reset-demo-data as super_admin returns deleted counts for expected collections
POST /api/crm/deals/bulk-action action=move updates stage on listed deals (verified via GET /api/crm/deals)
Login page renders 'Olvide mi password' link and modal with email input submits successfully
/settings Empresa tab shows reset-demo-data-button (data-testid) for super_admin
/crm-sync Pipeline tab shows pipeline-view-kanban and pipeline-view-list toggle buttons
Switching to Lista view renders table with stage dropdown and selection circles
Mobile viewport (390x844) shows sidebar-mobile-toggle hamburger that opens the sidebar drawer
action_items: (minor) Replace bare 'except:' in /api/auth/reset-password with 'except Exception' and log the error
(minor) Remove hardcoded JWT secret fallback in reset-password; rely only on os.environ['JWT_SECRET']
(enhancement) Make /api/auth/forgot-password return 200 for empty email instead of 400 to fully prevent enumeration
(enhancement) Consider tenant_id scoping / demo-flag guard on /api/admin/reset-demo-data
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 3144 lines - should be split into modular routers (auth, crm, leads, admin, email) for maintainability.
Reset-password endpoint uses bare except which swallows all errors and makes debugging hard.
No rate limiting on /api/auth/forgot-password - could be abused for email bombing.
JWT token for reset-password reuses access token type (24h expiry). Industry best practice is a short-lived (15-60 min) dedicated password_reset token type.
Trial expiry enforcement not tested - verify middleware checks trial_ends_at to block tenants after 15 days.

test_credentials.super_admin: admin@spectraflow.com / Admin123! (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md - NOTE: review_request mentioned pablo@disruptive-sw.com/12345678 which is NOT seeded; used admin@spectraflow.com instead)

seed_data_creation: Created transient users: trial-reset-*@example.com, trial-test-*@example.com, non-sa-*@example.com and their tenants; TEST_BulkDeal/TEST_BulkContact deals/contacts via admin tenant.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 10 features working. Note: super_admin credentials in /app/memory/test_credentials.md are admin@spectraflow.com/Admin123! — the pablo@disruptive-sw.com credentials mentioned in review requests are NOT seeded. /api/auth/reset-password uses JWT access tokens as reset tokens; tests fabricate the token using JWT_SECRET. CRM deals have no GET-by-id endpoint — use GET /api/crm/deals listing to verify. CRM Pipeline 'Lista' view uses custom circle icons (not native checkboxes) for selection.
